verses.text: Israel-te, Egypt gam panin pusuakin, Jakob innkuanpihte paudang a zang mite kiang pan a paikhiat uh ciangin
Judah-te, Topa' mi siangtho suak a, Israel-te, ama uk mi a suak hi
Tuipi in amaute mu-in taikhia a, Jordan gun a nungkik hi
Mual liante tuutal bangin diang uh a, mual neute tuuno bangin a diang uh hi
Tuipi aw, na taikhiatna ding, Jordan gun aw, na nungkikna ding
mual liante aw, tuu bangin mual neute aw, tuuno bangin na dian'na ding uh bang in hong nasak ahi hiam
Leitung aw, suangpi, bualtui suaksak a, meisuang, ciktui a suaksak, Jakob' Pasian' omna, Topa' omna-ah ling in.
